data.title: Sweden data center colocation market to grow at 25.88% CAGR from 2024 to 2030. Report covers top companies.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Sweden Data Center Colocation Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is projected to witness significant growth, with an expected CAGR of 25.88% from 2024 to 2030. The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the market, focusing on the supply and demand dynamics. Key metrics such as utilized white floor area, IT power capacity, and racks are used to determine market size. This report offers transparent research methodology and valuable insights for stakeholders.

data.title: Finland data center market to grow at 53.6% CAGR from 2024-2030. Cold climate offers natural cooling benefits. New entrants include Microsoft.
data.description: A report on Finland's data center market, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, projects a 53.6% CAGR growth from 2024 to 2030. The country's cold climate, with average temperatures below 6C, provides optimal conditions for natural free cooling in data centers, leading to a substantial decrease in energy usage for cooling systems.

data.title: Samsung Wallet collaborates with Splitit to offer in-store installment payments, allowing users to pay over time with their existing credit.
data.description: Customers shopping in-store now have the option to make payments over time through Samsung Wallet. The collaboration between Splitit and Samsung introduces a new feature allowing users to utilize their current credit for installment payments at the in-store checkout. This development, announced in Atlanta on July 24, 2025, aims to enhance the convenience of shopping by integrating installment payment options directly into Samsung Wallet. This collaboration brings a valuable addition to the electronic payment ecosystem, with the assistance of Splitit technology, facilitating smoother transactions for Samsung users looking to spread out their payments.

data.title: Connected Nation praises national AI action plan released by White House on July 24, 2025, highlighting urgency and opportunity.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Connected Nation (CN), a nonprofit organization dedicated to bridging the Digital Divide, commends the unveiling of a national strategy for Artificial Intelligence (AI) by the White House Office of Science and Technology. The plan, revealed recently, marks a significant step towards leveraging AI technology for societal advancement.

data.title: Houston CEO rebuilds company culture after personal struggles, showcasing change from within.
data.description: On July 23, 2025, in Houston, a CEO emphasized the importance of company culture as a critical aspect of business success. This CEO embodies the belief that significant transformations begin with leadership and are not simply superficial changes made for image purposes. The CEO highlighted that the most challenging rebrands occur internally rather than through external means. This perspective underscores the CEO's commitment to fostering a positive and empowering company culture that drives success.

data.title: Global cloud computing market expected to grow from $738.2 billion in 2025 to $1.6 trillion by 2030 at 17.2% CAGR. Leaders: Amazon Web Services, Microsoft, Google.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Cloud Computing Technologies: A Global Outlook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global cloud computing market is anticipated to increase from $738.2 billion in 2025 to an estimated $1.6 trillion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 17.2% between 2025 and 2030. The report offers insights into the global cloud computing market, examining market trends. The base year for the analysis in the report is 2024.

data.title: Taiwan construction sector to grow by 3.1% in 2025, fueled by leisure, energy, transport infrastructure investments.
data.description: A recent report available through ResearchAndMarkets.com discusses the Taiwan Construction Market, focusing on sectors such as Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential. The analysis predicts a 3.1% real terms expansion in the country's construction industry by 2025. This growth is attributed to investments in areas like leisure and hospitality, energy, and transport infrastructure projects. The Directorate General of Taiwan provides further insights into this trend.

data.title: Westwood Insurance partners with Legend Homes, a top 40 US builder, to offer home insurance at the beginning of homebuyers' journey.
data.description: Westwood Insurance Agency LLC, based in Woodland Hills, California, has partnered with Legend Homes, a top 40 home builder in the United States. Legend Homes will now offer home insurance through Westwood to its customers early in the homebuying process. Within 24 hours of signing a contract to purchase a new home with Legend Homes, customers can access this insurance offer. This collaboration aims to streamline the homebuying experience and provide added convenience and protection for buyers.

data.title: India's construction industry projected to grow by 7.1% in 2025, driven by investments in energy, industrial, railway projects.
data.description: A recent report on the India Construction Market has been released by a leading market research firm. The report indicates that the Indian construction industry is expected to see a growth of 7.1% in real terms in 2025. This growth is attributed to investments from both public and private sectors in various sectors such as energy, industrial, and railway projects. Additionally, the government's initiatives are also playing a significant role in driving this growth. The report provides insights on different sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, analyzing trends and forecasts until 2029. This information was revealed by ResearchAndMarkets.com.

data.title: Bitcoin stays above $118K amid rising institutional interest. Price at $118,468 (+0.44%), boosted by regulatory victories. New BTC trading by Standard Chartered contributes to bullish outlook.
data.description: The current price of Bitcoin is $118,468, showing a slight increase of 0.44%. This rise is attributed to significant institutional support due to recent regulatory victories and the introduction of Bitcoin trading by Standard Chartered.

data.title: Japanese AI firm targets 3,000 BTC in Bitcoin treasury through Hong Kong subsidiary GPT Pals Studio, aiming to achieve goal in 12 months.
data.description: Quantum Solutions, a Japanese AI company, has unveiled a specialized Bitcoin treasury through its Hong Kong branch, GPT Pals Studio. The initiative aims to amass a reserve of 3,000 BTC in the span of a year.

data.title: Carnegie Foundation releases R&D Agenda to transform US high schools, focusing on competency-based learning.
data.description: The R&D Agenda has been unveiled, detailing essential priorities for knowledge acquisition and tool development to facilitate a nationwide transition from traditional seat-time education to practical, competency-focused high school learning. Recently in Stanford, Calif., on July 24, 2025, the Carnegie Foundation for the Advancement of Teaching made public this agenda, aiming to revolutionize the education system.
